title: VibePod Data Explorer
description: Datasette UI for VibePod session logs and HTTP proxy traffic.

claude-tokens.title: Claude Code Token Usage
claude-tokens.description: Token consumption and model usage for Claude Code API calls captured by vibepod-proxy.

model.name: Model
model.query: SELECT model FROM (SELECT 'all' AS model, 0 AS ord UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(json_extract(CAST(r.body AS TEXT), '$.model'), ''), 'unknown') AS model, 1 AS ord FROM http_requests r WHERE r.host = 'api.anthropic.com' AND r.path LIKE '/v1/messages%' AND r.method = 'POST' AND json_extract(CAST(r.body AS TEXT), '$.model') IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY ord, model

container.name: Container
container.query: SELECT container FROM (SELECT 'all' AS container, 0 AS ord UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(r.source_container_name, ''), 'unknown') AS container, 1 AS ord FROM http_requests r WHERE r.host = 'api.anthropic.com' AND r.path LIKE '/v1/messages%' AND r.method = 'POST') ORDER BY ord, container

total_calls.title: Total API calls
total_calls.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_calls FROM http_requests r LEFT JOIN http_responses resp ON resp.request_id = r.id WHERE r.host = 'api.anthropic.com' AND r.path LIKE '/v1/messages%' AND r.method = 'POST' AND (COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') = 'all' OR datetime(r.timestamp) >= datetime('now', CASE COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') WHEN '1h' THEN '-1 hours' WHEN '24h' THEN '-24 hours' WHEN '7d' THEN '-7 days' WHEN '30d' THEN '-30 days' ELSE '-24 hours' END)) AND (COALESCE(:model, 'all') = 'all' OR json_extract(CAST(r.body AS TEXT), '$.model') = :model) AND (COALESCE(:container, 'all') = 'all' OR COALESCE(NULLIF(r.source_container_name, ''), 'unknown') = :container)

total_input_tokens.title: Total input tokens
total_input_tokens.query: WITH base AS (SELECT CASE WHEN resp.body IS NOT NULL AND instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"') > 0 THEN CAST(substr(ungzip(resp.body), instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"') + instr(substr(ungzip(resp.body), instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"')), '"input_tokens":') + 14, 10) AS INTEGER) WHEN resp.body IS NOT NULL AND json_valid(ungzip(resp.body)) THEN CAST(json_extract(ungzip(resp.body), '$.usage.input_tokens') AS INTEGER) ELSE 0 END AS input_tokens FROM http_requests r LEFT JOIN http_responses resp ON resp.request_id = r.id WHERE r.host = 'api.anthropic.com' AND r.path LIKE '/v1/messages%' AND r.method = 'POST' AND (COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') = 'all' OR datetime(r.timestamp) >= datetime('now', CASE COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') WHEN '1h' THEN '-1 hours' WHEN '24h' THEN '-24 hours' WHEN '7d' THEN '-7 days' WHEN '30d' THEN '-30 days' ELSE '-24 hours' END)) AND (COALESCE(:model, 'all') = 'all' OR json_extract(CAST(r.body AS TEXT), '$.model') = :model) AND (COALESCE(:container, 'all') = 'all' OR COALESCE(NULLIF(r.source_container_name, ''), 'unknown') = :container)) SELECT SUM(input_tokens) AS total_input_tokens FROM base

total_output_tokens.title: Total output tokens
total_output_tokens.query: WITH base AS (SELECT CASE WHEN resp.body IS NOT NULL AND instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"') > 0 THEN CAST(substr(ungzip(resp.body), instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"') + instr(substr(ungzip(resp.body), instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"')), '"output_tokens":') + 15, 10) AS INTEGER) WHEN resp.body IS NOT NULL AND json_valid(ungzip(resp.body)) THEN CAST(json_extract(ungzip(resp.body), '$.usage.output_tokens') AS INTEGER) ELSE 0 END AS output_tokens FROM http_requests r LEFT JOIN http_responses resp ON resp.request_id = r.id WHERE r.host = 'api.anthropic.com' AND r.path LIKE '/v1/messages%' AND r.method = 'POST' AND (COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') = 'all' OR datetime(r.timestamp) >= datetime('now', CASE COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') WHEN '1h' THEN '-1 hours' WHEN '24h' THEN '-24 hours' WHEN '7d' THEN '-7 days' WHEN '30d' THEN '-30 days' ELSE '-24 hours' END)) AND (COALESCE(:model, 'all') = 'all' OR json_extract(CAST(r.body AS TEXT), '$.model') = :model) AND (COALESCE(:container, 'all') = 'all' OR COALESCE(NULLIF(r.source_container_name, ''), 'unknown') = :container)) SELECT SUM(output_tokens) AS total_output_tokens FROM base

total_cache_read_tokens.title: Cache read tokens
total_cache_read_tokens.query: WITH base AS (SELECT CASE WHEN resp.body IS NOT NULL AND instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"') > 0 THEN CAST(substr(ungzip(resp.body), instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"') + instr(substr(ungzip(resp.body), instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"')), '"cache_read_input_tokens":') + 25, 10) AS INTEGER) WHEN resp.body IS NOT NULL AND json_valid(ungzip(resp.body)) THEN CAST(json_extract(ungzip(resp.body), '$.usage.cache_read_input_tokens') AS INTEGER) ELSE 0 END AS cache_read_tokens FROM http_requests r LEFT JOIN http_responses resp ON resp.request_id = r.id WHERE r.host = 'api.anthropic.com' AND r.path LIKE '/v1/messages%' AND r.method = 'POST' AND (COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') = 'all' OR datetime(r.timestamp) >= datetime('now', CASE COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') WHEN '1h' THEN '-1 hours' WHEN '24h' THEN '-24 hours' WHEN '7d' THEN '-7 days' WHEN '30d' THEN '-30 days' ELSE '-24 hours' END)) AND (COALESCE(:model, 'all') = 'all' OR json_extract(CAST(r.body AS TEXT), '$.model') = :model) AND (COALESCE(:container, 'all') = 'all' OR COALESCE(NULLIF(r.source_container_name, ''), 'unknown') = :container)) SELECT SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS total_cache_read_tokens FROM base

total_cache_write_tokens.title: Cache write tokens
total_cache_write_tokens.query: WITH base AS (SELECT CASE WHEN resp.body IS NOT NULL AND instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"') > 0 THEN CAST(substr(ungzip(resp.body), instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"') + instr(substr(ungzip(resp.body), instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"')), '"cache_creation_input_tokens":') + 29, 10) AS INTEGER) WHEN resp.body IS NOT NULL AND json_valid(ungzip(resp.body)) THEN CAST(json_extract(ungzip(resp.body), '$.usage.cache_creation_input_tokens') AS INTEGER) ELSE 0 END AS cache_write_tokens FROM http_requests r LEFT JOIN http_responses resp ON resp.request_id = r.id WHERE r.host = 'api.anthropic.com' AND r.path LIKE '/v1/messages%' AND r.method = 'POST' AND (COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') = 'all' OR datetime(r.timestamp) >= datetime('now', CASE COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') WHEN '1h' THEN '-1 hours' WHEN '24h' THEN '-24 hours' WHEN '7d' THEN '-7 days' WHEN '30d' THEN '-30 days' ELSE '-24 hours' END)) AND (COALESCE(:model, 'all') = 'all' OR json_extract(CAST(r.body AS TEXT), '$.model') = :model) AND (COALESCE(:container, 'all') = 'all' OR COALESCE(NULLIF(r.source_container_name, ''), 'unknown') = :container)) SELECT SUM(cache_write_tokens) AS total_cache_write_tokens FROM base

avg_tokens_per_call.title: Avg tokens / call
avg_tokens_per_call.query: WITH base AS (SELECT COALESCE(CASE WHEN resp.body IS NOT NULL AND instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"') > 0 THEN CAST(substr(ungzip(resp.body), instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"') + instr(substr(ungzip(resp.body), instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"')), '"input_tokens":') + 14, 10) AS INTEGER) WHEN resp.body IS NOT NULL AND json_valid(ungzip(resp.body)) THEN CAST(json_extract(ungzip(resp.body), '$.usage.input_tokens') AS INTEGER) ELSE 0 END, 0) + COALESCE(CASE WHEN resp.body IS NOT NULL AND instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"') > 0 THEN CAST(substr(ungzip(resp.body), instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"') + instr(substr(ungzip(resp.body), instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"')), '"output_tokens":') + 15, 10) AS INTEGER) WHEN resp.body IS NOT NULL AND json_valid(ungzip(resp.body)) THEN CAST(json_extract(ungzip(resp.body), '$.usage.output_tokens') AS INTEGER) ELSE 0 END, 0) AS total_tokens FROM http_requests r LEFT JOIN http_responses resp ON resp.request_id = r.id WHERE r.host = 'api.anthropic.com' AND r.path LIKE '/v1/messages%' AND r.method = 'POST' AND (COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') = 'all' OR datetime(r.timestamp) >= datetime('now', CASE COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') WHEN '1h' THEN '-1 hours' WHEN '24h' THEN '-24 hours' WHEN '7d' THEN '-7 days' WHEN '30d' THEN '-30 days' ELSE '-24 hours' END)) AND (COALESCE(:model, 'all') = 'all' OR json_extract(CAST(r.body AS TEXT), '$.model') = :model) AND (COALESCE(:container, 'all') = 'all' OR COALESCE(NULLIF(r.source_container_name, ''), 'unknown') = :container)) SELECT ROUND(AVG(total_tokens), 0) AS avg_tokens_per_call FROM base

token_trend.title: Token usage trend
token_trend.query: WITH base AS (SELECT r.timestamp AS ts, CASE WHEN resp.body IS NOT NULL AND instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"') > 0 THEN CAST(substr(ungzip(resp.body), instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"') + instr(substr(ungzip(resp.body), instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"')), '"input_tokens":') + 14, 10) AS INTEGER) WHEN resp.body IS NOT NULL AND json_valid(ungzip(resp.body)) THEN CAST(json_extract(ungzip(resp.body), '$.usage.input_tokens') AS INTEGER) ELSE 0 END AS input_tokens, CASE WHEN resp.body IS NOT NULL AND instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"') > 0 THEN CAST(substr(ungzip(resp.body), instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"') + instr(substr(ungzip(resp.body), instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"')), '"output_tokens":') + 15, 10) AS INTEGER) WHEN resp.body IS NOT NULL AND json_valid(ungzip(resp.body)) THEN CAST(json_extract(ungzip(resp.body), '$.usage.output_tokens') AS INTEGER) ELSE 0 END AS output_tokens FROM http_requests r LEFT JOIN http_responses resp ON resp.request_id = r.id WHERE r.host = 'api.anthropic.com' AND r.path LIKE '/v1/messages%' AND r.method = 'POST' AND (COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') = 'all' OR datetime(r.timestamp) >= datetime('now', CASE COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') WHEN '1h' THEN '-1 hours' WHEN '24h' THEN '-24 hours' WHEN '7d' THEN '-7 days' WHEN '30d' THEN '-30 days' ELSE '-24 hours' END)) AND (COALESCE(:model, 'all') = 'all' OR json_extract(CAST(r.body AS TEXT), '$.model') = :model) AND (COALESCE(:container, 'all') = 'all' OR COALESCE(NULLIF(r.source_container_name, ''), 'unknown') = :container)), buckets AS (SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE(:time_bucket, 'auto') = 'hour' OR (COALESCE(:time_bucket, 'auto') = 'auto' AND COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') IN ('1h', '24h')) THEN strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:00', datetime(ts)) ELSE strftime('%Y-%m-%d', datetime(ts)) END AS bucket, SUM(input_tokens) AS input_tokens, SUM(output_tokens) AS output_tokens FROM base GROUP BY bucket) SELECT bucket, 'input' AS series, input_tokens AS tokens FROM buckets UNION ALL SELECT bucket, 'output' AS series, output_tokens AS tokens FROM buckets ORDER BY bucket, series

model_breakdown.title: Tokens by model
model_breakdown.query: WITH base AS (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(json_extract(CAST(r.body AS TEXT), '$.model'), ''), 'unknown') AS model, COALESCE(CASE WHEN resp.body IS NOT NULL AND instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"') > 0 THEN CAST(substr(ungzip(resp.body), instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"') + instr(substr(ungzip(resp.body), instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"')), '"input_tokens":') + 14, 10) AS INTEGER) WHEN resp.body IS NOT NULL AND json_valid(ungzip(resp.body)) THEN CAST(json_extract(ungzip(resp.body), '$.usage.input_tokens') AS INTEGER) ELSE 0 END, 0) AS input_tokens, COALESCE(CASE WHEN resp.body IS NOT NULL AND instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"') > 0 THEN CAST(substr(ungzip(resp.body), instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"') + instr(substr(ungzip(resp.body), instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"')), '"output_tokens":') + 15, 10) AS INTEGER) WHEN resp.body IS NOT NULL AND json_valid(ungzip(resp.body)) THEN CAST(json_extract(ungzip(resp.body), '$.usage.output_tokens') AS INTEGER) ELSE 0 END, 0) AS output_tokens FROM http_requests r LEFT JOIN http_responses resp ON resp.request_id = r.id WHERE r.host = 'api.anthropic.com' AND r.path LIKE '/v1/messages%' AND r.method = 'POST' AND (COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') = 'all' OR datetime(r.timestamp) >= datetime('now', CASE COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') WHEN '1h' THEN '-1 hours' WHEN '24h' THEN '-24 hours' WHEN '7d' THEN '-7 days' WHEN '30d' THEN '-30 days' ELSE '-24 hours' END)) AND (COALESCE(:model, 'all') = 'all' OR json_extract(CAST(r.body AS TEXT), '$.model') = :model) AND (COALESCE(:container, 'all') = 'all' OR COALESCE(NULLIF(r.source_container_name, ''), 'unknown') = :container)) SELECT model, COUNT(*) AS call_count, SUM(input_tokens) AS input_tokens, SUM(output_tokens) AS output_tokens, SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens) AS total_tokens FROM base GROUP BY model ORDER BY total_tokens DESC LIMIT 10

recent_calls.title: Recent API calls
recent_calls.query: WITH base AS (SELECT r.id AS request_id, r.timestamp, COALESCE(NULLIF(r.source_container_name, ''), 'unknown') AS container, COALESCE(NULLIF(json_extract(CAST(r.body AS TEXT), '$.model'), ''), 'unknown') AS model, resp.status_code, resp.duration_ms, CASE WHEN resp.body IS NOT NULL AND instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"') > 0 THEN CAST(substr(ungzip(resp.body), instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"') + instr(substr(ungzip(resp.body), instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"')), '"input_tokens":') + 14, 10) AS INTEGER) WHEN resp.body IS NOT NULL AND json_valid(ungzip(resp.body)) THEN CAST(json_extract(ungzip(resp.body), '$.usage.input_tokens') AS INTEGER) ELSE NULL END AS input_tokens, CASE WHEN resp.body IS NOT NULL AND instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"') > 0 THEN CAST(substr(ungzip(resp.body), instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"') + instr(substr(ungzip(resp.body), instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"')), '"output_tokens":') + 15, 10) AS INTEGER) WHEN resp.body IS NOT NULL AND json_valid(ungzip(resp.body)) THEN CAST(json_extract(ungzip(resp.body), '$.usage.output_tokens') AS INTEGER) ELSE NULL END AS output_tokens, CASE WHEN resp.body IS NOT NULL AND instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"') > 0 THEN CAST(substr(ungzip(resp.body), instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"') + instr(substr(ungzip(resp.body), instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"')), '"cache_read_input_tokens":') + 25, 10) AS INTEGER) WHEN resp.body IS NOT NULL AND json_valid(ungzip(resp.body)) THEN CAST(json_extract(ungzip(resp.body), '$.usage.cache_read_input_tokens') AS INTEGER) ELSE NULL END AS cache_read_tokens, CASE WHEN resp.body IS NOT NULL AND instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"') > 0 THEN CAST(substr(ungzip(resp.body), instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"') + instr(substr(ungzip(resp.body), instr(ungzip(resp.body), '"type":"message_delta"')), '"cache_creation_input_tokens":') + 29, 10) AS INTEGER) WHEN resp.body IS NOT NULL AND json_valid(ungzip(resp.body)) THEN CAST(json_extract(ungzip(resp.body), '$.usage.cache_creation_input_tokens') AS INTEGER) ELSE NULL END AS cache_write_tokens FROM http_requests r LEFT JOIN http_responses resp ON resp.request_id = r.id WHERE r.host = 'api.anthropic.com' AND r.path LIKE '/v1/messages%' AND r.method = 'POST' AND (COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') = 'all' OR datetime(r.timestamp) >= datetime('now', CASE COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') WHEN '1h' THEN '-1 hours' WHEN '24h' THEN '-24 hours' WHEN '7d' THEN '-7 days' WHEN '30d' THEN '-30 days' ELSE '-24 hours' END)) AND (COALESCE(:model, 'all') = 'all' OR json_extract(CAST(r.body AS TEXT), '$.model') = :model) AND (COALESCE(:container, 'all') = 'all' OR COALESCE(NULLIF(r.source_container_name, ''), 'unknown') = :container)) SELECT request_id, timestamp, container, model, status_code, input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_read_tokens, cache_write_tokens, duration_ms FROM base ORDER BY datetime(timestamp) DESC LIMIT CAST(CASE WHEN CAST(COALESCE(:request_limit, 100) AS INTEGER) < 20 THEN 20 WHEN CAST(COALESCE(:request_limit, 100) AS INTEGER) > 500 THEN 500 ELSE CAST(COALESCE(:request_limit, 100) AS INTEGER) END AS INTEGER)

http-requests.title: HTTP Requests Dashboard
http-requests.description: Traffic, status, host, and error trends from vibepod-proxy.

method.name: Method
method.query: SELECT method FROM (SELECT 'all' AS method, 0 AS ord UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT UPPER(method) AS method, 1 AS ord FROM http_requests WHERE method IS NOT NULL AND method != '') ORDER BY ord, method

agent.name: Agent
agent.query: SELECT agent FROM (SELECT 'all' AS agent, 0 AS ord UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN COALESCE(source_container_name, '') = '' THEN 'unknown' WHEN source_container_name LIKE 'vibepod-%' THEN CASE WHEN instr(substr(source_container_name, 9), '-') > 0 THEN substr(substr(source_container_name, 9), 1, instr(substr(source_container_name, 9), '-') - 1) ELSE substr(source_container_name, 9) END ELSE source_container_name END AS agent, 1 AS ord FROM http_requests) ORDER BY ord, agent

total_requests.title: Total requests
total_requests.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_requests FROM http_requests r LEFT JOIN http_responses resp ON resp.request_id = r.id LEFT JOIN http_errors err ON err.request_id = r.id WHERE (COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') = 'all' OR datetime(r.timestamp) >= datetime('now', CASE COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') WHEN '1h' THEN '-1 hours' WHEN '24h' THEN '-24 hours' WHEN '7d' THEN '-7 days' WHEN '30d' THEN '-30 days' ELSE '-24 hours' END)) AND (TRIM(COALESCE(:host_query, '')) = '' OR LOWER(COALESCE(r.host, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(TRIM(:host_query)) || '%') AND (COALESCE(:method, 'all') = 'all' OR UPPER(COALESCE(r.method, '')) = UPPER(:method)) AND (COALESCE(:status_class, 'all') = 'all' OR (:status_class = '2xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 200 AND 299) OR (:status_class = '3xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 300 AND 399) OR (:status_class = '4xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 400 AND 499) OR (:status_class = '5xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 500 AND 599) OR (:status_class = 'error' AND (resp.status_code >= 400 OR err.error_type IS NOT NULL))) AND (COALESCE(:agent, 'all') = 'all' OR CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.source_container_name, '') = '' THEN 'unknown' WHEN r.source_container_name LIKE 'vibepod-%' THEN CASE WHEN instr(substr(r.source_container_name, 9), '-') > 0 THEN substr(substr(r.source_container_name, 9), 1, instr(substr(r.source_container_name, 9), '-') - 1) ELSE substr(r.source_container_name, 9) END ELSE r.source_container_name END = :agent)

total_errors.title: Total errors
total_errors.query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN resp.status_code >= 400 OR err.error_type IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_errors FROM http_requests r LEFT JOIN http_responses resp ON resp.request_id = r.id LEFT JOIN http_errors err ON err.request_id = r.id WHERE (COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') = 'all' OR datetime(r.timestamp) >= datetime('now', CASE COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') WHEN '1h' THEN '-1 hours' WHEN '24h' THEN '-24 hours' WHEN '7d' THEN '-7 days' WHEN '30d' THEN '-30 days' ELSE '-24 hours' END)) AND (TRIM(COALESCE(:host_query, '')) = '' OR LOWER(COALESCE(r.host, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(TRIM(:host_query)) || '%') AND (COALESCE(:method, 'all') = 'all' OR UPPER(COALESCE(r.method, '')) = UPPER(:method)) AND (COALESCE(:status_class, 'all') = 'all' OR (:status_class = '2xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 200 AND 299) OR (:status_class = '3xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 300 AND 399) OR (:status_class = '4xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 400 AND 499) OR (:status_class = '5xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 500 AND 599) OR (:status_class = 'error' AND (resp.status_code >= 400 OR err.error_type IS NOT NULL))) AND (COALESCE(:agent, 'all') = 'all' OR CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.source_container_name, '') = '' THEN 'unknown' WHEN r.source_container_name LIKE 'vibepod-%' THEN CASE WHEN instr(substr(r.source_container_name, 9), '-') > 0 THEN substr(substr(r.source_container_name, 9), 1, instr(substr(r.source_container_name, 9), '-') - 1) ELSE substr(r.source_container_name, 9) END ELSE r.source_container_name END = :agent)

error_rate.title: Error rate
error_rate.query: SELECT ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN resp.status_code >= 400 OR err.error_type IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS error_rate_pct FROM http_requests r LEFT JOIN http_responses resp ON resp.request_id = r.id LEFT JOIN http_errors err ON err.request_id = r.id WHERE (COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') = 'all' OR datetime(r.timestamp) >= datetime('now', CASE COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') WHEN '1h' THEN '-1 hours' WHEN '24h' THEN '-24 hours' WHEN '7d' THEN '-7 days' WHEN '30d' THEN '-30 days' ELSE '-24 hours' END)) AND (TRIM(COALESCE(:host_query, '')) = '' OR LOWER(COALESCE(r.host, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(TRIM(:host_query)) || '%') AND (COALESCE(:method, 'all') = 'all' OR UPPER(COALESCE(r.method, '')) = UPPER(:method)) AND (COALESCE(:status_class, 'all') = 'all' OR (:status_class = '2xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 200 AND 299) OR (:status_class = '3xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 300 AND 399) OR (:status_class = '4xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 400 AND 499) OR (:status_class = '5xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 500 AND 599) OR (:status_class = 'error' AND (resp.status_code >= 400 OR err.error_type IS NOT NULL))) AND (COALESCE(:agent, 'all') = 'all' OR CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.source_container_name, '') = '' THEN 'unknown' WHEN r.source_container_name LIKE 'vibepod-%' THEN CASE WHEN instr(substr(r.source_container_name, 9), '-') > 0 THEN substr(substr(r.source_container_name, 9), 1, instr(substr(r.source_container_name, 9), '-') - 1) ELSE substr(r.source_container_name, 9) END ELSE r.source_container_name END = :agent)

avg_duration_ms.title: Avg response duration
avg_duration_ms.query: SELECT ROUND(AVG(resp.duration_ms), 1) AS avg_duration_ms FROM http_requests r LEFT JOIN http_responses resp ON resp.request_id = r.id LEFT JOIN http_errors err ON err.request_id = r.id WHERE (COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') = 'all' OR datetime(r.timestamp) >= datetime('now', CASE COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') WHEN '1h' THEN '-1 hours' WHEN '24h' THEN '-24 hours' WHEN '7d' THEN '-7 days' WHEN '30d' THEN '-30 days' ELSE '-24 hours' END)) AND (TRIM(COALESCE(:host_query, '')) = '' OR LOWER(COALESCE(r.host, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(TRIM(:host_query)) || '%') AND (COALESCE(:method, 'all') = 'all' OR UPPER(COALESCE(r.method, '')) = UPPER(:method)) AND (COALESCE(:status_class, 'all') = 'all' OR (:status_class = '2xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 200 AND 299) OR (:status_class = '3xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 300 AND 399) OR (:status_class = '4xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 400 AND 499) OR (:status_class = '5xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 500 AND 599) OR (:status_class = 'error' AND (resp.status_code >= 400 OR err.error_type IS NOT NULL))) AND (COALESCE(:agent, 'all') = 'all' OR CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.source_container_name, '') = '' THEN 'unknown' WHEN r.source_container_name LIKE 'vibepod-%' THEN CASE WHEN instr(substr(r.source_container_name, 9), '-') > 0 THEN substr(substr(r.source_container_name, 9), 1, instr(substr(r.source_container_name, 9), '-') - 1) ELSE substr(r.source_container_name, 9) END ELSE r.source_container_name END = :agent)

status_breakdown.title: Status code breakdown
status_breakdown.query: SELECT CASE WHEN resp.status_code IS NULL AND err.error_type IS NOT NULL THEN 'proxy_error' WHEN resp.status_code IS NULL THEN 'no_response' ELSE CAST(resp.status_code AS TEXT) END AS status_code, COUNT(*) AS request_count FROM http_requests r LEFT JOIN http_responses resp ON resp.request_id = r.id LEFT JOIN http_errors err ON err.request_id = r.id WHERE (COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') = 'all' OR datetime(r.timestamp) >= datetime('now', CASE COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') WHEN '1h' THEN '-1 hours' WHEN '24h' THEN '-24 hours' WHEN '7d' THEN '-7 days' WHEN '30d' THEN '-30 days' ELSE '-24 hours' END)) AND (TRIM(COALESCE(:host_query, '')) = '' OR LOWER(COALESCE(r.host, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(TRIM(:host_query)) || '%') AND (COALESCE(:method, 'all') = 'all' OR UPPER(COALESCE(r.method, '')) = UPPER(:method)) AND (COALESCE(:status_class, 'all') = 'all' OR (:status_class = '2xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 200 AND 299) OR (:status_class = '3xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 300 AND 399) OR (:status_class = '4xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 400 AND 499) OR (:status_class = '5xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 500 AND 599) OR (:status_class = 'error' AND (resp.status_code >= 400 OR err.error_type IS NOT NULL))) AND (COALESCE(:agent, 'all') = 'all' OR CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.source_container_name, '') = '' THEN 'unknown' WHEN r.source_container_name LIKE 'vibepod-%' THEN CASE WHEN instr(substr(r.source_container_name, 9), '-') > 0 THEN substr(substr(r.source_container_name, 9), 1, instr(substr(r.source_container_name, 9), '-') - 1) ELSE substr(r.source_container_name, 9) END ELSE r.source_container_name END = :agent) GROUP BY status_code ORDER BY request_count DESC, status_code ASC LIMIT 20

host_breakdown.title: Top hosts by traffic
host_breakdown.query: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(r.host, ''), 'unknown') AS host, COUNT(*) AS request_count, SUM(CASE WHEN resp.status_code >= 400 OR err.error_type IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS error_count, ROUND(AVG(resp.duration_ms), 1) AS avg_duration_ms FROM http_requests r LEFT JOIN http_responses resp ON resp.request_id = r.id LEFT JOIN http_errors err ON err.request_id = r.id WHERE (COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') = 'all' OR datetime(r.timestamp) >= datetime('now', CASE COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') WHEN '1h' THEN '-1 hours' WHEN '24h' THEN '-24 hours' WHEN '7d' THEN '-7 days' WHEN '30d' THEN '-30 days' ELSE '-24 hours' END)) AND (TRIM(COALESCE(:host_query, '')) = '' OR LOWER(COALESCE(r.host, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(TRIM(:host_query)) || '%') AND (COALESCE(:method, 'all') = 'all' OR UPPER(COALESCE(r.method, '')) = UPPER(:method)) AND (COALESCE(:status_class, 'all') = 'all' OR (:status_class = '2xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 200 AND 299) OR (:status_class = '3xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 300 AND 399) OR (:status_class = '4xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 400 AND 499) OR (:status_class = '5xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 500 AND 599) OR (:status_class = 'error' AND (resp.status_code >= 400 OR err.error_type IS NOT NULL))) AND (COALESCE(:agent, 'all') = 'all' OR CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.source_container_name, '') = '' THEN 'unknown' WHEN r.source_container_name LIKE 'vibepod-%' THEN CASE WHEN instr(substr(r.source_container_name, 9), '-') > 0 THEN substr(substr(r.source_container_name, 9), 1, instr(substr(r.source_container_name, 9), '-') - 1) ELSE substr(r.source_container_name, 9) END ELSE r.source_container_name END = :agent) GROUP BY host ORDER BY CASE WHEN COALESCE(:host_sort, 'request_count') = 'request_count' THEN request_count END DESC, CASE WHEN COALESCE(:host_sort, 'request_count') = 'error_count' THEN error_count END DESC, CASE WHEN COALESCE(:host_sort, 'request_count') = 'avg_duration_ms' THEN avg_duration_ms END DESC, request_count DESC, host ASC LIMIT 12

request_error_trend.title: Request and error trend
request_error_trend.query: WITH filtered AS (SELECT r.timestamp AS ts, CASE WHEN resp.status_code >= 400 OR err.error_type IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_error FROM http_requests r LEFT JOIN http_responses resp ON resp.request_id = r.id LEFT JOIN http_errors err ON err.request_id = r.id WHERE (COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') = 'all' OR datetime(r.timestamp) >= datetime('now', CASE COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') WHEN '1h' THEN '-1 hours' WHEN '24h' THEN '-24 hours' WHEN '7d' THEN '-7 days' WHEN '30d' THEN '-30 days' ELSE '-24 hours' END)) AND (TRIM(COALESCE(:host_query, '')) = '' OR LOWER(COALESCE(r.host, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(TRIM(:host_query)) || '%') AND (COALESCE(:method, 'all') = 'all' OR UPPER(COALESCE(r.method, '')) = UPPER(:method)) AND (COALESCE(:status_class, 'all') = 'all' OR (:status_class = '2xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 200 AND 299) OR (:status_class = '3xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 300 AND 399) OR (:status_class = '4xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 400 AND 499) OR (:status_class = '5xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 500 AND 599) OR (:status_class = 'error' AND (resp.status_code >= 400 OR err.error_type IS NOT NULL))) AND (COALESCE(:agent, 'all') = 'all' OR CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.source_container_name, '') = '' THEN 'unknown' WHEN r.source_container_name LIKE 'vibepod-%' THEN CASE WHEN instr(substr(r.source_container_name, 9), '-') > 0 THEN substr(substr(r.source_container_name, 9), 1, instr(substr(r.source_container_name, 9), '-') - 1) ELSE substr(r.source_container_name, 9) END ELSE r.source_container_name END = :agent)), buckets AS (SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE(:time_bucket, 'auto') = 'hour' OR (COALESCE(:time_bucket, 'auto') = 'auto' AND COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') IN ('1h', '24h')) THEN strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:00', datetime(ts)) ELSE strftime('%Y-%m-%d', datetime(ts)) END AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS request_count, SUM(is_error) AS error_count FROM filtered GROUP BY bucket) SELECT bucket, 'requests' AS series, request_count AS value FROM buckets UNION ALL SELECT bucket, 'errors' AS series, error_count AS value FROM buckets ORDER BY bucket, series

top_hosts_table.title: Host statistics
top_hosts_table.query: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(r.host, ''), 'unknown') AS host, COUNT(*) AS request_count, SUM(CASE WHEN resp.status_code >= 400 OR err.error_type IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS error_count, ROUND(AVG(resp.duration_ms), 1) AS avg_duration_ms FROM http_requests r LEFT JOIN http_responses resp ON resp.request_id = r.id LEFT JOIN http_errors err ON err.request_id = r.id WHERE (COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') = 'all' OR datetime(r.timestamp) >= datetime('now', CASE COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') WHEN '1h' THEN '-1 hours' WHEN '24h' THEN '-24 hours' WHEN '7d' THEN '-7 days' WHEN '30d' THEN '-30 days' ELSE '-24 hours' END)) AND (TRIM(COALESCE(:host_query, '')) = '' OR LOWER(COALESCE(r.host, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(TRIM(:host_query)) || '%') AND (COALESCE(:method, 'all') = 'all' OR UPPER(COALESCE(r.method, '')) = UPPER(:method)) AND (COALESCE(:status_class, 'all') = 'all' OR (:status_class = '2xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 200 AND 299) OR (:status_class = '3xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 300 AND 399) OR (:status_class = '4xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 400 AND 499) OR (:status_class = '5xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 500 AND 599) OR (:status_class = 'error' AND (resp.status_code >= 400 OR err.error_type IS NOT NULL))) AND (COALESCE(:agent, 'all') = 'all' OR CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.source_container_name, '') = '' THEN 'unknown' WHEN r.source_container_name LIKE 'vibepod-%' THEN CASE WHEN instr(substr(r.source_container_name, 9), '-') > 0 THEN substr(substr(r.source_container_name, 9), 1, instr(substr(r.source_container_name, 9), '-') - 1) ELSE substr(r.source_container_name, 9) END ELSE r.source_container_name END = :agent) GROUP BY host ORDER BY CASE WHEN COALESCE(:host_sort, 'request_count') = 'request_count' THEN request_count END DESC, CASE WHEN COALESCE(:host_sort, 'request_count') = 'error_count' THEN error_count END DESC, CASE WHEN COALESCE(:host_sort, 'request_count') = 'avg_duration_ms' THEN avg_duration_ms END DESC, request_count DESC, host ASC LIMIT 20

recent_requests.title: Recent requests
recent_requests.query: SELECT r.id AS request_id, r.timestamp, COALESCE(NULLIF(r.source_container_name, ''), NULLIF(r.source_container_id, ''), 'unknown') AS source_container, COALESCE(r.method, '?') AS method, COALESCE(NULLIF(r.host, ''), 'unknown') AS host, COALESCE(r.path, '') AS path, resp.status_code, resp.duration_ms, err.error_type FROM http_requests r LEFT JOIN http_responses resp ON resp.request_id = r.id LEFT JOIN http_errors err ON err.request_id = r.id WHERE (COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') = 'all' OR datetime(r.timestamp) >= datetime('now', CASE COALESCE(:time_range, '24h') WHEN '1h' THEN '-1 hours' WHEN '24h' THEN '-24 hours' WHEN '7d' THEN '-7 days' WHEN '30d' THEN '-30 days' ELSE '-24 hours' END)) AND (TRIM(COALESCE(:host_query, '')) = '' OR LOWER(COALESCE(r.host, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(TRIM(:host_query)) || '%') AND (COALESCE(:method, 'all') = 'all' OR UPPER(COALESCE(r.method, '')) = UPPER(:method)) AND (COALESCE(:status_class, 'all') = 'all' OR (:status_class = '2xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 200 AND 299) OR (:status_class = '3xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 300 AND 399) OR (:status_class = '4xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 400 AND 499) OR (:status_class = '5xx' AND resp.status_code BETWEEN 500 AND 599) OR (:status_class = 'error' AND (resp.status_code >= 400 OR err.error_type IS NOT NULL))) AND (COALESCE(:agent, 'all') = 'all' OR CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.source_container_name, '') = '' THEN 'unknown' WHEN r.source_container_name LIKE 'vibepod-%' THEN CASE WHEN instr(substr(r.source_container_name, 9), '-') > 0 THEN substr(substr(r.source_container_name, 9), 1, instr(substr(r.source_container_name, 9), '-') - 1) ELSE substr(r.source_container_name, 9) END ELSE r.source_container_name END = :agent) ORDER BY CASE WHEN COALESCE(:request_sort, 'timestamp_desc') = 'timestamp_asc' THEN datetime(r.timestamp) END ASC, CASE WHEN COALESCE(:request_sort, 'timestamp_desc') = 'timestamp_desc' THEN datetime(r.timestamp) END DESC, CASE WHEN COALESCE(:request_sort, 'timestamp_desc') = 'duration_asc' THEN resp.duration_ms END ASC, CASE WHEN COALESCE(:request_sort, 'timestamp_desc') = 'duration_desc' THEN resp.duration_ms END DESC, CASE WHEN COALESCE(:request_sort, 'timestamp_desc') = 'status_asc' THEN resp.status_code END ASC, CASE WHEN COALESCE(:request_sort, 'timestamp_desc') = 'status_desc' THEN resp.status_code END DESC, CASE WHEN COALESCE(:request_sort, 'timestamp_desc') = 'errors_first' THEN CASE WHEN resp.status_code >= 400 OR err.error_type IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END END ASC, datetime(r.timestamp) DESC LIMIT CAST(CASE WHEN CAST(COALESCE(:request_limit, 100) AS INTEGER) < 20 THEN 20 WHEN CAST(COALESCE(:request_limit, 100) AS INTEGER) > 500 THEN 500 ELSE CAST(COALESCE(:request_limit, 100) AS INTEGER) END AS INTEGER)

logs.title: Session Logs
logs.description: Interactive sessions and submitted messages captured by VibePod.

recent_sessions.title: Recent sessions
recent_sessions.sql: SELECT s.id, s.started_at, s.ended_at, s.agent, s.container_name, s.exit_reason, COUNT(m.id) AS message_count FROM sessions s LEFT JOIN messages m ON m.session_id = s.id GROUP BY s.id ORDER BY s.started_at DESC LIMIT CAST(COALESCE(:limit, 100) AS INTEGER)

recent_messages.title: Recent messages
recent_messages.sql: SELECT m.timestamp, m.session_id, s.agent, s.container_name, m.content FROM messages m JOIN sessions s ON s.id = m.session_id ORDER BY m.timestamp DESC LIMIT CAST(COALESCE(:limit, 200) AS INTEGER)

proxy.title: HTTP Proxy Logs
proxy.description: Captured HTTP request/response traffic from vibepod-proxy.

recent_requests.title: Recent proxied requests
recent_requests.sql: SELECT r.id AS request_id, r.timestamp, COALESCE(NULLIF(r.source_container_name, ''), NULLIF(r.source_container_id, ''), 'unknown') AS source_container, r.method, r.host, r.path, resp.status_code, resp.duration_ms, err.error_type FROM http_requests r LEFT JOIN http_responses resp ON resp.request_id = r.id LEFT JOIN http_errors err ON err.request_id = r.id ORDER BY r.timestamp DESC LIMIT CAST(COALESCE(:limit, 200) AS INTEGER)

top_hosts.title: Top request hosts
top_hosts.sql: SELECT host, COUNT(*) AS request_count FROM http_requests WHERE host IS NOT NULL AND host != '' GROUP BY host ORDER BY request_count DESC LIMIT CAST(COALESCE(:limit, 50) AS INTEGER)

top_sources.title: Top source containers
top_sources.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(source_container_name, ''), NULLIF(source_container_id, ''), 'unknown') AS source_container, COUNT(*) AS request_count FROM http_requests GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(source_container_name, ''), NULLIF(source_container_id, ''), 'unknown') ORDER BY request_count DESC LIMIT CAST(COALESCE(:limit, 50) AS INTEGER)
